reviews.review_description: The first space game to actually be good and it’s free keep up the good work love the game man join my community if you wanna support him

Maybe the title says it all.
Defend the ship (truck) from squishy aliens.
Repair panels damaged by meteors.
Learn the intricacies of refuelling (mine for fuel)
Gather your cargo (by lasso and repeller - reminiscent of Hardspace: Shipbreaker)
The lack of instruction might disappoint some people - but others (me) will get satisfaction from working out what's what.
I do find the left thumb control a bit annoying. Left, right, forward, back, as normal then press the thumb stud to move up (forward) or down (back).
This might be standard with some controllers and games, but I've not come across it before. Too many times the stud gets pressed by mistake and I'm suddenly moving upwards, not towards. But hey! It's just another technique to learn.

Great fun. Hoping for some more content though.
The art style is insanely creative, the gameplay mechanics are unique and smooth, and it’s an absolute blast to play with friends. Space Truck Rodeo deserves way more attention!
This game has some really cool and unique game mechanics. I really like the multiplayer.
The perfect environment for Salinas and giggles with friends phenomenal game awesome original mechanics and a lot of fun highly recommend
